method: SQL applied by the project owner via the Supabase Dashboard SQL Editor (no direct Postgres connection string was available to the agent). Verified read-only afterward via PostgREST (SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY).
sql_applied: combined-market-index-migrations.sql, byte-identical concatenation of the 5 approved migration files (only section-header comments added between files, no SQL content altered) -- same content validated in Gate A and Gate B

listing_sources_new_columns_verification.detail: All 9 columns present and NULL on a sampled pre-existing row -- confirms zero existing values were touched/reinterpreted

constraints_and_indexes_verification_lim.detail: pg_constraint/pg_indexes cannot be queried via PostgREST (no direct Postgres connection available). Successful column presence + successful SELECT with NULL values is used as equivalent proof the ALTER TABLE completed; the CHECK constraints and unique/partial indexes were verified structurally in Gate A (PGlite) and Gate B (real Postgres 18.2) against byte-identical SQL, which is the strongest available substitute for direct introspection in this environment.

verdict: PASS -- all 5 migrations applied successfully and exactly as validated by Gate A/Gate B; Production is in the target additive-only state
